column3: With whom did you finish your Usability Study?
column7: It was easy to register an account and login to ReadIT after registration
column8: It was intutive to identify where the Profile Page on ReadIT is located at
column9: The terminology of Posts and Channels makes it clear what ReadIT stands for and what you can expect with each click
column10: It is easy to interact with other posts and comments such as Like or Dislike a Post or Comment
column11: You could easily figure out where the Channels are located and how you can create a new Channel
column12: It is intutive that your liked posts appear on your Profile Page
column13: It was easy to create a post in a channel
column14: You would like to use this application again to view different people's opinion on something that you like
column15: We appreciate your comments and feedback. Is there something else you feel you missed from the Usability Study but would like to include over here?
